subject: Re: Dave Christopher
body:
thnks


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, October 31, 2006 2:20:03 PM
Subject: Dave Christopher



 

I told Dave Christopher that he needs to provide us with paint and haul out 
quote and quote for engine deposit for next water taxi before he is going to get 
an answer from you.  So, as soon as I get the figures from Dave I will 
forward them to you.

 

Darren K. 
Indyke
